Ruth Mariam Mathew

Kunjumariam

as she receives the Sacrament of Holy Baptism and is welcomed into God's family, together with the Holy Mass.

August 03 Monday · 2026

"I have called you by your name, beloved child — you are mine."

Isaiah 43:1
Please join us for the Baptism of our daughter

With hearts full of gratitude, we — Amal & Angel — cordially invite you and your family to witness this sacred and joyous occasion, as our little one is anointed and welcomed into the family of Christ.

Your presence, prayers and blessings would mean the world to us as we begin this beautiful journey of faith for our daughter.

With Love & Blessings

Lovingly guided by her parents and embraced in faith by her godparents
